授業の概要・背景: Each week, students will make a collection of pictures that describe the topic for that week (for example, "My hobbies", or, "Travel"). Then the students will work in pairs and talk about each other's pictures and ideas. After 10-15 minutes, students will change partner and start again. The repetition allows students to gain in confidence as well as to practice new ideas. At the end of the class, the teacher will give feedback and make suggestions on how to improve for next week, for example,  explaining discourse structures or strategies for topic pursuit.

These homework are designed to help students each week in class. Deadline - LAST CLASS.
